fields.name: columns
fields.label: Columns
fields.description: Number of content columns in the mega-menu. Leave empty for a simple link (no dropdown).

fields.name: hasBottomRow
fields.label: Has bottom row
fields.description: Show a promo bar at the bottom of the dropdown (AI highlight strip with gradient border).

fields.name: imageCard
fields.label: Promo image card
fields.description: Style of the promo image column on the right side of the dropdown.

fields.name: label
fields.label: Tab label
fields.description: Text shown in the nav bar. If this menu is a simple link, also fill in the Link field below.

fields.name: link
fields.label: Link (simple menus only)
fields.description: Destination URL. Only used when Columns is set to 'Simple link'.

fields.name: heading
fields.label: Column heading
fields.description: Bold heading shown at the top of this column (e.g. 'Products', 'Use Cases').

fields.name: items
fields.label: Items
fields.description: List of nav items. Use the list format: each item should have an icon (optional), a link, and a short description on the next line.

fields.name: footerLink
fields.label: Footer link
fields.description: Optional 'View all …' link shown at the bottom of this column.

fields.name: footerLinkText
fields.label: Footer link text
fields.description: Label for the footer link (e.g. 'View all use cases').

fields.name: prefix
fields.label: Prefix text
fields.description: Plain text before the bold product name (e.g. 'Build digital resilience with').

fields.name: productName
fields.label: Product name (bold, gradient)
fields.description: Product name rendered with the orange-to-pink gradient (e.g. 'Splunk AI').

fields.name: ctaText
fields.label: CTA text
fields.description: Label for the call-to-action link (e.g. 'Learn More').

fields.name: heading
fields.label: Heading
fields.description: Short headline inside the promo card.

fields.name: linkText
fields.label: Link text
fields.description: CTA text inside the promo card (e.g. 'Explore the product tour').
